evals.prompt: 我想加一个团队邀请功能，支持邮箱邀请、过期时间和撤销邀请。
evals.expected_output: 识别为新功能和多步行为变更，进入完整 spec flow；检查 Superpowers 是否可用；在 spec 对齐前不写代码；通过 brainstorming 产出 spec，再进入 plan/task；plan/task 完成后默认选择 subagent-driven-development 执行，而不是把 inline execution 当默认路径。
expectations: The run selects the full spec flow for a multi-step feature
The run checks for required Superpowers skills before implementation
The run does not write implementation code before spec alignment and approval
The run defaults to subagent-driven-development after plan/task creation instead of inline execution

evals.prompt: 登录页点提交会 500，帮我修一下。
evals.expected_output: 识别为简单 bugfix，走 lightweight bugfix flow；先系统化复现和定位；能写回归测试时先写失败测试，再修复，最后跑针对性验证。除非 bug 揭示 durable 约束，否则不强制完整 spec。
expectations: The run selects the lightweight bugfix flow rather than full spec flow
The run investigates and reproduces before proposing a fix
The run adds or plans a regression test before implementation when practical

evals.prompt: 我们刚才说好的计费规则变了：试用期用户也要进入用量统计。继续改代码吧。
evals.expected_output: 识别为 coding 中的需求变更；判断该变更影响行为和 spec，因此先更新 spec/plan 或请求对齐，再继续实现；同时保持 TDD 和验证要求。
expectations: The run detects that the prompt changes an approved requirement
The run updates or asks to update the spec before continuing because behavior changed
The run keeps TDD and verification requirements after the requirement change

evals.prompt: 这个需求很简单，直接改吧：给用户设置页加一个导出数据按钮。
evals.expected_output: 即使用户说简单，也识别为用户可见新功能；默认进入完整 spec flow 或提出极短 spec 对齐，不直接开始 coding；说明如果用户明确豁免流程才可走例外。
expectations: The run does not skip spec flow merely because the user calls a feature simple
The run asks for or produces concise requirement alignment before coding

evals.prompt: Spec 已经通过了，也已经生成了 implementation plan。继续执行任务，不用再问我走哪种模式。
evals.expected_output: 识别已有 approved spec 和 implementation plan；默认使用 superpowers:subagent-driven-development 执行任务，不再询问 subagent vs inline；只有 subagent skill 不可用、任务强耦合无法拆分、或用户明确要求 inline 时才改用 executing-plans 或请求确认。
expectations: The run defaults to superpowers:subagent-driven-development when an approved plan exists
The run does not ask the user to choose between subagent-driven and inline execution when subagent-driven is available
The run treats inline executing-plans as an explicit fallback rather than the default
